name: Lisas' Hot Italian Meatball Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, pork, cornflake crumbs, evaporated milk, egg, Italian seasoning, and onion flakes in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Form the mixture into 1 1/2 inch meatballs.
3. Cube the mozzarella into 1/2-inch cubes.
4. Press one cube of mozzarella into each meatball, covering them well with the mixture.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake for 18-20 minutes.
6. In a saucepan, heat the pizza sauce over medium heat until warm.
7. Slice a V-shaped lengthwise cut into each sub roll using a sharp knife.
8. Use the cut-out piece as breadcrumbs later.
9. Pile the meatballs onto the bottom of the roll.
10. Spoon pizza sauce on top and place a slice of mozzarella cheese evenly over the length of the sandwich on the top of the roll.
11. Place under the broiler for 2-3 minutes or until bubbly.
